title: Open-MaoField: Finite Projection Order Defects in Residual Metric Audits
description: Open-MaoField v1.0.0 is a public, sanitized release surface for the MaoField research programme. It contains a finite-dimensional note on projection order defects in weighted two-way residual metric audits, an exact rational 2x2 certificate, and deterministic regression-harness artifacts. The release is motivated by the lower-level mathematical problem behind black-box LLM evaluation: after scalar metrics, main effects, decoding artifacts, smoothing trends, judge protocols, aggregation weights, and coordinate choices are stripped away, what non-scalar structure remains mathematically well defined? This release does not claim a MaoField empirical positive result, full-panel execution, checkpoint inference, model training, a new optimization loss, deployed-model residual/interaction/transport/holonomy observations, a completed broad theory of ANOVA, dependent-input decomposition, projection products, model collapse, or interpretability. The deterministic harness and JSON files are regression support only; the mathematical claims are carried by the analytic proof and exact rational certificate.
notes: Claim boundary: this is a finite mathematical and reproducibility release, not an empirical MaoField positive result or a peer-reviewed publication.
